drama: You will slip and fall today.
You will get into a fight today.
A dog will bite you today.
Someone will break into your car today.
solution: Dont leave your car unattended for today or park inside a garage.

drama: Someone will break into your house today.
solution: Lock the doors and stay on high alert.

drama: You will forget your phones password.

solution: Run. Just run. Dont get caught.
Dont get arrested just run and never look back.

drama: You will run from the police and end up on the most wanted list.
